privileged_info_summary: The task requires assigning Library of Congress KF classification call numbers to three landmark Supreme Court cases. The metadata specifies three different call numbers for each case: Brown v. Board of Education (KF4155 .B76 1954), Miranda v. Arizona (KF9625 .M57 1966), and Marbury v. Madison (KF4541 .M37 1803). However, according to the official Library of Congress catalog records, all three cases are classified under KF101, not the more specific numbers claimed in the task metadata. The Library of Congress assigns KF101 as the base classification for U.S. Supreme Court decisions in these subject areas. This indicates the task metadata contains incorrect or synthetic call number data.
